message:
core: add comparison, CASE, CAST, IS NULL to connection API (bd-202x)

Enhance the Connection::prepare/query path to support:
- Comparison operators (Eq/Ne/Lt/Le/Gt/Ge) producing 0/1 integer results
- IS/IS NOT with NULLEQ semantics
- CASE expressions (simple and searched forms)
- CAST expressions with type affinity mapping
- IS NULL / IS NOT NULL expressions

Add 4 new tests exercising the public API:
- SELECT 3 > 2, 1 = 1, 5 < 3 → [1, 1, 0]
- SELECT CASE WHEN 1 THEN 'yes' ELSE 'no' END → ["yes"]
- SELECT -42 → [-42]
- SELECT NULL IS NULL → [1]

Also fix import ordering in epoch.rs (rustfmt).

9 connection tests pass, clippy clean, fmt clean.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
